meta.titleSuffix: Maytham Altaan — Clinical Pharmacy, AI Tools & Education
meta.description: Clinical pharmacy expertise, medical education courses, the Altaan AI Detector, and private consulting services.

home.heroTitle: Bridging clinical pharmacy, statistics, and software.
home.heroSubtitle: I'm Dr. Maytham Altaan — Registered Senior Clinical Pharmacist at Medical City Baghdad, owner of NIHAD-Alkheir Pharmacy, founder of Sequoia Academy, and the builder behind the Altaan AI Detector and three published iOS apps.
home.servicesTitle: Four ways I can help you
home.servicesSubtitle: Each service is built around real expertise — clinical, technical, or both.
home.service1Desc: Self-paced clinical pharmacy courses under the Sequoia Academy brand — practical training for students and practitioners.
home.service2Desc: Detect and humanize AI-generated text. Live now and built for writers, researchers, and educators.
home.service3Desc: Three iOS apps on the App Store, plus clinical work at Medical City and ownership of NIHAD-Alkheir Pharmacy.
home.service4Desc: One-on-one consulting in clinical pharmacy, biostatistics, research methodology, and freelance programming.
home.aboutTitle: Clinical pharmacist with a builder's mindset.
home.aboutBody: I practice clinical pharmacy at Medical City Baghdad, own NIHAD-Alkheir Pharmacy, and build software on the side — iOS apps, the Altaan AI Detector, and the educational content that lives under Sequoia Academy. Clinical, statistical, and technical work pull from the same toolkit.
home.ctaTitle: Have a project, a question, or want to collaborate?

about.title: Dr. Maytham Altaan
about.subtitle: Clinical pharmacist, biostatistician, and app developer based in Baghdad.
about.bioBody: I'm a clinical pharmacist with extensive experience in hospital and community pharmacy practice, clinical supervision, and biostatistics. I serve as a Registered Senior Clinical Pharmacist at Medical City Baghdad — joined in 2017 and served as Chief Resident from 2023 to 2024 — and own NIHAD-Alkheir Pharmacy in Baghdad (since 2019). In 2024 I founded Sequoia Academy to house the educational work I had been doing informally for years. Alongside clinical practice I build software — three published iOS apps, the Altaan AI Detector, and ongoing freelance work in biostatistics and programming.
about.credential1: Clinical Pharmacy Board Residency — Medical City (completed October 2024)
about.credential5: Peer Reviewer — Wiley Health Science Reports
about.missionBody: To make high-quality clinical knowledge accessible in the developing world — through Sequoia Academy and direct teaching — and to ship tools that help people work with technology on honest terms.
about.value1Body: Every educational and product decision traces back to whether it actually helps real practitioners and the patients they serve.
about.value2Body: I prefer clear explanations over jargon. If a concept can't be explained simply, it's not understood well enough yet.
about.value3Body: I am a solo builder by choice. It keeps the work honest and the iteration fast.

courses.title: Medical Courses
courses.subtitle: Practical clinical pharmacy education designed for students and practitioners in resource-conscious settings.
courses.course1Desc: A complete introduction to the clinical reasoning, communication, and patient-care skills that separate a clinical pharmacist from a dispenser.
courses.course2Desc: Targeted therapies, dosing, toxicity management — built from real case work, including EGFR-mutant NSCLC management.
courses.course3Desc: ICU pharmacotherapy, sepsis bundles, and antimicrobial stewardship principles applicable in low-resource hospitals.
courses.course4Desc: Designing, running, and writing up clinical research as a busy practitioner. Statistics in plain language.
courses.formatBody: Self-paced video courses with downloadable resources, case-based assignments, and a private discussion space. Most courses are delivered in Arabic with English supplementary materials, or vice versa.

aiDetector.title: Altaan AI Detector
aiDetector.subtitle: Detect AI-generated writing. Humanize it back into something that reads like you.
aiDetector.intro: The Altaan AI Detector is a two-sided tool: a detector that tells you how machine-like a piece of text reads, and a humanizer that rewrites text so it sounds like a person — without changing the meaning. Built for researchers, students, writers, and educators.
aiDetector.feature1Desc: Score any text on how likely it was machine-generated. Sentence-level and document-level breakdowns.
aiDetector.feature2Desc: Rewrite AI-flagged passages into natural prose that preserves meaning and tone — yours, not a robot's.
aiDetector.feature3Desc: Built to work in Arabic and English from day one. More languages on the roadmap.
aiDetector.feature4Desc: Your text is processed for your request and not used to train models. Period.
aiDetector.pricingBody: A free tier is available now. Paid tiers for power users, students, and researchers are coming as the tool matures.
aiDetector.liveBody: The Altaan AI Detector is already shipping. Open it in a new tab and try it on your own text.

work.title: Selected Work
work.subtitle: Apps I've shipped, places I work, and academic service I contribute to.
work.appsSubheading: Four products currently live and in use.
work.appDetectorDesc: Bilingual AI text detector and humanizer. Built end-to-end and shipped at altaan-detector.vercel.app.
work.appCinematiDesc: Arabic-first companion app for film and TV — browse, track, and discover. Published on the App Store.
work.appCalorieDesc: حاسبة السعرات العربية — an Arabic-language calorie and nutrition tracker for everyday use.
work.appResidipokDesc: Mobile utility published on the App Store. Tap to open the listing.
work.rolesSubheading: Where I practice, what I run.
work.role1Desc: Patient-centered pharmaceutical care for complex cases including multi-drug-resistant infections. Previously served as Chief Resident; supervised PharmaD students in 2024. Recognized with multiple commendation letters.
work.role2Desc: Day-to-day pharmacy operations, regulatory compliance, and community health work. Also distributor for Curvy Faja products since 2023.
work.role3Desc: Educational brand consolidating my teaching and course work for clinical pharmacy students and practitioners.
work.academic3Org: University of Baghdad, College of Pharmacy
work.viewMore: More work coming as projects publish.

services.title: Work With Me Directly
services.subtitle: One-on-one consulting engagements for institutions, researchers, and practitioners.
services.service1Desc: Protocol review, complex case consultation, antimicrobial stewardship, and supervision support. Best for hospitals and clinics building or refining their clinical pharmacy practice.
services.service2Desc: Study design, statistical analysis, and interpretation for clinical and academic projects. From sample size calculations to manuscript-ready results.
services.service3Desc: Methodology design, study setup, statistical interpretation, and manuscript review for clinicians and trainees. Practical, hands-on, no academic theater.
services.service4Desc: Custom software for clinical and academic projects — calculators, data tools, mobile and web apps. Built by someone who knows the domain, not just the code.
services.engagementBody: Every engagement starts with a free 20-minute introductory call to scope the work. From there, I propose a fixed-price or hourly engagement based on what fits. I work in English and Arabic.

contact.title: Let's talk
contact.subtitle: Send a message and I'll get back to you personally — usually within a few days.
contact.messagePlaceholder: Tell me a bit about what you're looking for.
contact.successBody: Thanks — I'll be in touch shortly.
contact.errorBody: Please try again, or email me directly.

footer.tagline: Clinical pharmacy, AI tools, and education — built honestly.
